titleStmt.title: SII 9.500: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 500. (A.R. No. 19 of 1915.) IN THE EASTERN PORCH, LEFT OF THE ENTRANCE INTO THE TEMPLE AT SRISAILAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1438, Yuva, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15, Budhavāra, Chandra-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1515 July 25, Wednesday with a lunar eclipse, in the reign of Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāya. After mentioning the king's conquest of Udayagiridurga, the capture of Tirumalarāutarāya-Mahāpātra, the subjugation of Addaṅki, Vinikoṇḍe, Bellaṁkoṇḍe, Nāgārjuṇikoṇḍe, Taṅgeḍa, Kētavara and Koṇḍavīḍudurga, the capture of Vīrabhadrarāya, son of Pratāparudra-Gajapati, Naraharidēva, son of Komarā-Pātra, Mallūkhāna of Rāchūru, Uddaṇḍakhāna and others, it records the gifts of tulāpūrusha, ratnadhēnu and saptasāgara made by the king and his queens Chinnādēvamma and Tirumaladēvamma in the presence of Amarēśvaradēva on the bank of the river Kṛishṇavēṇī and his order for the construction of a stone maṇḍapa in the car street at Śrīparvata after his arrival there. It also states that he had granted the villages, Pārumañchāla and Ātakūru for offerings to the god Mallikārjuna in the year Śrīmukha, Vaiśākha, śu. 11, Guruvāra corresponding to A.D. 1513 April 15 Friday, not Thursday. Further he is stated to have remitted tolls on kāvaḍis, packhorses, bullocks, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayūbhyadayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu 1438 neya yuva
saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śudha 15 budhavāradalū candragrahaṇa pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalli śrīmalli
kārjunamahādēvarige śrīmamahārājādhirājan™ paramēśvara mūrurāyara gaṁ
ḍa Arirāyara vibhāḍa Aṣṭadikurāyamanōbhayaṁkara bhāṣage tappuva rāyara gaṁḍa
pūrvadakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhīśvara yavanarājyasthāpanācārya gajapativibhāḍa śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇadēvamahāyaru vijayanāgaradiṁda pūrvadigvijayayātrege bi
jayamāḍi Udayagiri durgavanū sādhisi tirumalarautarāya mahāpātranū hiḍidukoṁḍu A
ddaṁki vinikoṁḍe bellaṁkoṁḍe nāgārjunikoṁḍe taṁgeḍa kētavara modalāda giridurgasthaladurgagaḷanū
yēkadhāḷiyali kaikoṁḍu koṁḍavīḍudurgada mēle biṭṭu laggeya hiḍisi durgava tekkoṁḍu pratāparudragaja
patirāya komāra vīrabhadrarāya komārapātrana maga naraharidēu rācūra mallūkhāna Uddaṁḍa
khāna jaṁnyāla kasavāpātra pūsapāṭi rājirāja śrīnātharājana lakṣmīpatirāja paścima bālacaṁdramahā
pātra yivaru modalāda pātrasāmaṁtaranū maṁniyaranū jīvagrāhavāgi hiḍidukoṁḍu
Avarige Abhayadānava koṭṭu dharaṇikōṭe Amarēśvarakke bijamāḍi kṛṣṇavēṇyanadī tīradalli A
marēśvaradēvara saṁnidhiyalli tulāpuruṣa mahādānavaṁ māḍi cittaisi taṁma dēviyaru ciṁnā
dēvaṁmanavara kaiyalli ratnadhēnumahādānavanū tiramaladēvaṁmanavara kaiyalli saptasāgarama
hādānavanu māḍisi Alliṁda śrīparvatakke bijeyamāḍi yā dēvara tērabīdi śilāmaṁṭapavāgi kaṭṭi
sa cittayisidaru Ā śrīmukhasaṁvacharada vayiśākha śudha 11 guruvāradalū madhyā(ṁ)hna
da Avasarada mahāneyivēdyake pārumaṁcāla grāma 1 Ātukūra grāma 1 Ubhayaṁ
grāma 2 ḍanū samarpisidaru kambikāvaḍi suṁka kudure Ettukatte telehoṟe modalādavara kai
yyasuṁkava koḷadahāge māḍistau yidake Ācaṁdrārkavāgi naḍayaluḷadu �yo dharma Āru
tappade naḍasidarū Ā pu(ṁ)ṇyapuruṣara pāda naṁma sirassina mēle dharisiU . �yo dharmake
Āru hāni Eṇisi naḍasade yidarū Ā pāpakharmaru ta(ṁ)mma tāyitaṁdeyanū
brahmaranū kapiladhēnu vāraṇāsiyali gaṁgātīradali koṁda pāpadali hōgaluḷḷavaru
svadattādviguṇiṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ paradattā(ā)nupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt . sāmāniyōyaṁ dharmasētarnrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvā
nētānṛ(ṁ) bhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁdrān bhōyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdrā . śrī
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.500 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
